vulnerabilities.title: Interest Rate Curve Smoothing
vulnerabilities.description: Sudden jumps in utilization can lead to steep interest rate hikes that might cause mass liquidation events before borrowers can react.
vulnerabilities.impact: MEDIUM - Potential for cascading liquidations in high volatility periods.
vulnerabilities.likelihood: LOW - Requires specific asset supply/demand imbalance.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Implement a smoothing factor or a lagged update mechanism for the kinked interest rate model.
